summary: Completed testing of Django multi-circle community platform iteration 2. Session persistence partially fixed but still has issues. Backend APIs working well (88% success rate). Frontend authentication works initially but has intermittent session loss issues.

minor_bugs.issue: Circle creation fails with 'Slug already exists' error from previous test runs
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot create new circles with same slug

critical_bugs.issue: Intermittent session loss - users get logged out unexpectedly during navigation between views
critical_bugs.impact: Users lose session when switching between role views or after certain actions

ui_bugs.issue: Registration page redirects to home page instead of staying on registration form
Cannot access circle creation form - session lost when navigating to site manager circles page
ui_bugs.impact: Site managers cannot create new circles through UI

integration_issues.issue: Session persistence fails when switching between user/admin/site manager views

passed_tests: Backend authentication APIs (login, logout, profile) - 88% success rate
action_item_for_main_agent: Session persistence issue partially fixed but still has problems. Users get logged out intermittently when navigating between role views or after certain actions. This prevents testing of circle creation, registration flow, and full admin functionality. Need to investigate session handling in role switching and form submissions.
